title: dahlia crocea var. flava
intro: Dahlia crocea var. flava is a plant species, specifically a type of dahlia, that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is commonly used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and it may also help to treat skin conditions and wounds. The herbal preparations of Dahlia crocea var. flava can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote healing and well-being.
